input.prompt: A founder sits squarely facing the camera, makes natural eye contact with the lens, and says "Most marketers waste their first 3 seconds." Calm, direct, conversational delivery. Soft natural light from a window camera-left, uncluttered modern background. Cinematic, shallow depth of field. Quiet ambient room tone in the audio.
input.negative_prompt: low quality, blurry, jittery, distorted, watermark, on-screen text overlay, captions, subtitles
